productDisplayName: Baggit Women Dhano Taj Black Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or convert it to a sling bag with the detachable shoulder strap. Dimensions: 16 cm x 10 cm Crafted from genuine leatherette with a flap that has a magnetic closure Three fold design with zippered pocket and a compartment on the left fold Three card holder slots with two pockets with a detachable side that hides the detachable shoulder strap Two card holder slots, one photo id slot and a pocket on the right side Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
